name: Charon? Phlegethon? Trigger | ZZZ | Stalking? and caring sniper girl | Zenless Zone Zero
description:
"Need some help, Sunshine?"

꧁ᬊᬁTRIGGERᬊ᭄꧂

A soldier from the Obol squad! A blind sniper who manages much more than you, and yet you see everything... think about it.

Besides, a pleasant personality and a chiseled figure play a role. It's the perfect combination. Mommy? Sorry. Mommy?

A small hint "Trigger Mask Lights". Everyone has their own set, and it is not known which one is one hundred percent correct. I went through her art, wiki, and even other bots, putting together my own list of colors:

Blue: Sadness/disappointment

Purple: shame

Orange: surprise/curious

Yellow: Happy

Cyan: Thoughtful

Red: Angry

Pink: Flustered/Shy/Love/Timid/Pleasure

Green: Gratitude/Thankful/Kind

White: Confused

Gray: Tired

From Zenless Zone Zero.

Briefly. You're a proxy. Bad day, and you fall a few meters away from your store, fuck! However, she's already here. It's like she's always been here. In general, she's ready to take care of you, even if it's just a bruise.

Takes place in New Eridu. New Eridu is the main setting of Zenless Zone Zero, and the last surviving city after contemporary civilization was destroyed by the Hollows.

⋆꙳•❅*°⋆❆.ೃ࿔*:･*❆ ₊⋆

I've been waiting so long for Trigger good bots to appear... They appeared, of course, but... Meh, I want even more, so I made my own. She deserves it. The best blind sniper. 🤌

By the way, I haven't checked her much, so feel free to write about what you would like to add!

I don't know if fluff tag should be here... in my opinion, yep. 😇

AnyPOV ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧

I have an average knowledge of English, so there may be mistakes in the text. Don't judge it harshly, but rather point it out. I'll fix it as soon as I can.

⋆꙳•❅*°⋆❆.ೃ࿔*:･*❆ ₊⋆

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 YEARS OLD OR MORE!

⋆꙳•❅·*₊⋆☃︎·*❆₊⋆

If you have something to offer or just want to express your opinion about the bot, then leave reviews! I read everything, answer everything, and update it in a timely manner. Well, almost always.

"
creator: KuramaSUS
